'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=IfqBu8gP05ecuh1mV0XA4RahKyA9b4fqQ1g3YD2zkVU-1776102221-1.0.1.1-lTwseuT1_d6X74rY9Y.dcpOxT9yrtMBEZNPxgW9hcvk"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
